---
title: "UIAO_126 — Test Plans Program"
subtitle: "Canonical Catalog"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "The canonical catalog of test plans across the UIAO substrate."
categories: [canon, programs, testing, ci]
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical spec at
[`src/uiao/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md).
The authoritative copy lives in `core/`. If you want the short
narrative explanation instead, read the
[companion walkthrough](../narrative/program-test-plans.qmd).
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
## First delivery shipped (2026-04-26)
[ScubaGear conformance test plan](test-plans/scubagear-conformance-test-plan.qmd) — UIAO_121 instantiation against the `scubagear` adapter (Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3 status). See [`deliveries.qmd`](deliveries.qmd) for future deliveries.
:::

{{< include ../../src/uiao/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md >}}
